articles.title: Santos and Paintsil score first-half goals in 3rd straight 1-1 draw between Dynamo and Galaxy
articles.description: Houston's Guilherme Santos matched a first-half goal by Los Angeles' Joseph Paintsil and the Dynamo and Galaxy played to a 1-1 draw on Saturday night. Paintsil staked the Galaxy to a 1-0 lead with an unassisted score in the 30th minute and Santos answered in the 41st with assists from Jack McGlynn — his fourth — and defender Antônio Carlos — his first. Santos has eight goals in his first 14 appearances in the league.
